nodes.name: Receive Experiment Request
nodes.notes: Entry point for raw experiment requests. For testing, submit idea_text plus optional clarification_answers, reviewer_action, reviewer_comments, baseline_inputs, and max_iterations.

nodes.name: Standardize Input Payload
nodes.notes: Normalizes inbound request fields so the workflow can be tested with both complete and incomplete payloads.

nodes.name: Initialize Experiment Context
nodes.notes: Creates workflow context and experiment identifiers used throughout scoring, iteration, and approval.

nodes.name: Generate Experiment Brief (AI)
nodes.notes: Uses the raw idea to create the first structured experiment brief.

nodes.name: Validate & Structure Brief
nodes.notes: Validates the initial brief, adds fallback behavior for malformed AI output, and identifies missing fields.

nodes.name: Check Missing Information
nodes.notes: Routes incomplete requests into a clarification path; complete requests continue directly to review.

nodes.name: Generate Clarification Questions (AI)
nodes.notes: Generates the minimal clarification questions needed to make the brief analytically reviewable.

nodes.name: Extract Clarification Questions
nodes.notes: Extracts clarification questions with a deterministic fallback set for testing.

nodes.name: Check If Clarifications Provided
nodes.notes: If clarification answers are present in the test payload, the brief is rebuilt. Otherwise the workflow returns a clarification request.

nodes.name: Return Clarification Request
nodes.notes: Returns clarification questions to the caller and ends only the clarification-needed path.

nodes.name: Merge Clarifications Into Brief
nodes.notes: Merges clarification answers into the normalized request before the brief rebuild step.

nodes.name: Rebuild Experiment Brief (AI)
nodes.notes: Rebuilds the experiment brief using the clarification answers.

nodes.name: Validate Updated Brief
nodes.notes: Validates the rebuilt brief after clarification and rejoins the main review flow.

nodes.name: Evaluate Experiment Design (AI)
nodes.notes: Reviews the experiment brief like a senior experimentation analyst.

nodes.name: Extract Review Insights
nodes.notes: Combines AI review output with deterministic governance checks such as missing primary metric or randomization unit.

nodes.name: Compute Experiment Readiness Score
nodes.notes: Computes the deterministic control score used to govern the AI recommendation.

nodes.name: Estimate Experiment Metrics
nodes.notes: Estimates practical experiment metrics such as baseline rate, uplift, sample size, and rough duration.

nodes.name: Generate Experiment Decision (AI)
nodes.notes: Generates the governed experiment recommendation while the deterministic score remains the control layer.

nodes.name: Log Decision & Iteration History
nodes.notes: Logs the decision, score, and iteration feedback with graceful fallback if AI JSON is malformed.

nodes.name: Check Launch Readiness
nodes.notes: Launch-ready items go to human approval. Non-ready items go into the controlled refinement loop.

nodes.name: Check Iteration Limit
nodes.notes: Checks whether another refinement cycle is allowed. If not, the workflow finalizes with a governed non-ready outcome.

nodes.name: Improve Experiment Design (AI)
nodes.notes: Improves the experiment design using structured review and decision feedback.

nodes.name: Update Brief & Increment Iteration
nodes.notes: Applies the refined brief, writes the change summary into iteration history, and increments the iteration counter.

nodes.name: Check Approval Status
nodes.notes: Checks whether human approval input is already present in the request. If not, returns an approval request response.

nodes.name: Request Human Approval
nodes.notes: Returns the governed decision package and ends only the awaiting-approval path.

nodes.name: Check If Changes Requested
nodes.notes: Routes changes-requested approval outcomes back into the refinement loop.

nodes.name: Check If Rejected
nodes.notes: Separates explicit rejection from approval.

nodes.name: Finalize Approval Status
nodes.notes: Normalizes the final approval or max-iteration status before output generation.

nodes.name: Generate Experiment Documentation (AI)
nodes.notes: Generates final experiment documentation and auditable business artifacts.

nodes.name: Prepare Artifact Outputs
nodes.notes: Prepares the final artifact bundle and output paths with safe fallback if AI documentation parsing fails.

parameters.responseBody:
={{ {
  status: 'completed',
  experiment_id: $json.experiment_id,
  experiment_slug: $json.experiment_slug,
  final_decision: $json.decision_result.final_recommendation,
  approval_status: $json.approval_status,
  iteration_history: $json.iteration_history,
  readiness_scoring: $json.readiness_scoring,
  stats_summary: $json.stats_summary,
  artifact_paths: $json.artifact_paths,
  artifact_bundle: $json.artifact_bundle
} }}

nodes.name: Return Final Experiment Package
nodes.notes: Returns the final decision package, iteration history, and generated artifacts.
